## What

Briefly, what does this change?

## Why

The motivation / issue it addresses (link issues with `#123`).

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (svelte-check)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `cargo check` passes (if Rust changed)
- [ ] Tested the affected flow manually (note the OS)
- [ ] No secrets, debrid keys, or personal info in the diff
